TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Bob Boozer sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1937 , ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 4, Bob Boozer, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2012) qnxan nya Bob Boozer m'rkyas ru htagan beh sa Omaha, Nebraska. Bob Boozer tmasot pqwasan biru gocyu mnaki Omaha. hiya rangi' Bob Gibson,raral ga mqwas biru beh Kansas hopa pqwasan biru.kawas tay 1958, hiya ga wal ku qragan mnwah Wildcats. kawas tay 1960 hoqan abaw lga, Boozer ru Royals Oscar Robertson. Bob Boozer tmasot qyanux na bincyogun lga musa Omaha,praw mrhuw maki Bell Systems. kawas tay 2020,ryax sa tay 19 nqu tay 5,wal mhuqil la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: βoβ βoozer s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj **** , rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, βoβ βoozer, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) qnxan nja βoβ βoozer mʔrkjas~ɕ ru ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa omaħa, neβras~ɕka. βoβ βoozer tmas~ɕot pqwas~ɕan βiru ɣoʦ~ʨju mnaki omaħa. ħija raŋiʔ βoβ ɣiβs~ɕon,raral ɣa mqwas~ɕ βiru βeħ kans~ɕas~ɕ ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru.kawas~ɕ taj ****, ħija ɣa wal ku qraɣan mnwaħ wil*ʦ~ʨats~ɕ. kawas~ɕ taj **** ħoqan aβaw lɣa, βoozer ru rojals~ɕ os~ɕʦ~ʨar roβerts~ɕon. βoβ βoozer tmas~ɕot qjanux na βinʦ~ʨjoɣun lɣa mus~ɕa omaħa,praw mrħuw maki βell s~ɕjs~ɕtems~ɕ. kawas~ɕ taj ****,rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *,wal mħuqil la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
S.FORM: Bob Boozer sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1937 , ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 4, Bob Boozer, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2012) qnxan nya Bob Boozer m'rkyas ru htagan beh sa Omaha, Nebraska. Bob Boozer tmasot pqwasan biru gocyu mnaki Omaha. hiya rangi' Bob Gibson,raral ga mqwas biru beh Kansas hopa pqwasan biru.kawas tay 1958, hiya ga wal ku qragan mnwah Wildcats. kawas tay 1960 hoqan abaw lga, Boozer ru Royals Oscar Robertson. Bob Boozer tmasot qyanux na bincyogun lga musa Omaha,praw mrhuw maki Bell Systems. kawas tay 2020,ryax sa tay 19 nqu tay 5,wal mhuqil la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: βoβ βoozer s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj **** , rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, βoβ βoozer, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) qnxan nja βoβ βoozer mʔrkjas~ɕ ru ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa omaħa, neβras~ɕka. βoβ βoozer tmas~ɕot pqwas~ɕan βiru ɣoʦ~ʨju mnaki omaħa. ħija raŋiʔ βoβ ɣiβs~ɕon,raral ɣa mqwas~ɕ βiru βeħ kans~ɕas~ɕ ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru.kawas~ɕ taj ****, ħija ɣa wal ku qraɣan mnwaħ wil*ʦ~ʨats~ɕ. kawas~ɕ taj **** ħoqan aβaw lɣa, βoozer ru rojals~ɕ os~ɕʦ~ʨar roβerts~ɕon. βoβ βoozer tmas~ɕot qjanux na βinʦ~ʨjoɣun lɣa mus~ɕa omaħa,praw mrħuw maki βell s~ɕjs~ɕtems~ɕ. kawas~ɕ taj ****,rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *,wal mħuqil la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
